scripts.generate:openapi: ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=OpenApi dotnet build services/clips/api/Nucleus.Clips.csproj /p:OpenApiGenerateDocumentsOnBuild=true --disable-build-servers && ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=OpenApi dotnet build services/minecraft/api/Nucleus.Minecraft.csproj /p:OpenApiGenerateDocumentsOnBuild=true --disable-build-servers && node scripts/merge-openapi.mjs
scripts.generate:api-client: bun run generate:openapi && bun run generate --cwd packages/nucleus-api-client && bun run build --cwd packages/nucleus-api-client
